domain_rule: list active stores must expose only stores passing active, publication, visibility, and serviceability policy; closed or unavailable state remains explicit and never fabricated
api_contract: NEW_REQUIRED: GET /dsh/stores
db_objects: DSH operational aggregate, version field, audit reference and outbox where effects exist
auth_rule: For 'list active stores': authenticated client; role and function permission; tenant, store, assignment and object ownership checks; deny by default without disclosing object existence
wlt_boundary: DSH may retain opaque financial references and read-only statuses only; payment, refund, settlement, payout, commission, COD and ledger mutation forbidden
wlt_dependency: DSH may retain opaque financial references and read-only statuses only; payment, refund, settlement, payout, commission, COD and ledger mutation forbidden
state_transitions: Read-only operation 'list active stores'; no domain transition; stale/read-model status must be disclosed
error_cases: For 'list active stores': invalid filter or cursor; store not found; store hidden by policy; unavailable zone; identity dependency unavailable; repository timeout
negative_cases: For 'list active stores': cross-tenant identifier, non-owner object, wrong role, unassigned actor, duplicate request, replayed event, malformed ID, oversized page or payload
performance_rule: For 'list active stores': cursor or bounded offset pagination, indexed filters, deterministic ordering, maximum page size 100, query-count and p95 latency evidence
observability_rule: For 'list active stores': structured outcome log, trace span, latency/error/retry metrics, correlationId, actor scope, aggregate ID, transition and idempotency reference without secrets
visual_reference: Named screen state and donor visual comparison in DSH-001
evidence_required: Contract review for 'list active stores'; authorization and negative tests; domain transition test; concurrency/idempotency test when writing; runtime trace and audit evidence before completion
next_action: Approve GET /dsh/stores and GET /dsh/stores/{storeId} in service-owned OpenAPI
acceptance_gate: domain rules complete and negative cases defined
